section_order: Hero > Features > Social Proof > Pricing > Final CTA
color_strategy: Primary color hero accent CTA on white
effects: Fade-in on scroll card hover lift
conversion_tips: Keep hero headline under 8 words. Show the product not a tagline.

color_strategy: Neutral problem section vivid solution section
conversion_tips: Lead with the pain not the solution. Proof must be specific with numbers.

section_order: Hero with embedded demo > Features > Testimonials > CTA
effects: Auto-play muted video interactive prototype embed
conversion_tips: Interactive demos convert 3x better than static screenshots.

color_strategy: Trust blue throughout neutral testimonial cards
conversion_tips: 3-5 testimonials with photos and titles outperform quotes alone.

section_order: Problem statement > Agitation > Solution > Features > CTA
color_strategy: Dark red/orange problem section green solution section
effects: Parallax problem imagery clean solution entrance
conversion_tips: Name the specific pain in the first sentence.

section_order: Hero > Competitor comparison table > Why us > CTA
color_strategy: Neutral competitor columns vivid your-brand column
conversion_tips: Never name competitors directly. Use generic labels like "Traditional tools".

section_order: Founder story > Mission > Product > Proof > CTA
conversion_tips: Personal founder stories increase trust for B2C and SMB audiences.

section_order: Free tool > Results > Upgrade prompt > Features > Pricing
color_strategy: Neutral free tier vivid premium tier
effects: Tool interaction animations smooth upgrade modal
conversion_tips: The free tool must deliver real value. Gate enhancements not core value.

section_order: Announcement > Countdown > Features > Early access CTA
color_strategy: Dark urgent palette with accent countdown
conversion_tips: Urgency only works if the deadline is real. False urgency destroys trust.

section_order: Hero > Selected work > Process > Client logos > Contact
color_strategy: Minimal neutral let work provide color
effects: Image hover zoom smooth project transitions
conversion_tips: Show results not just aesthetics. Revenue lifted conversion rate improved etc.
